calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-29-2009 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Benjamin M. Heuer, Esq. and Jessica A. Ballou, Esq. appeared for plaintiff St. Anthony Foundtion, a California nonprofit religious organization.
Linda Pasquinucci, Deputy Executive Director for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Martha Sainz.
Default was entered against defendant on January 30, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff St. Anthony Foundation, a California nonprofit religious organization, and against the Defaulted Defendant Martha Sainz as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,545.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,861.72.
Costs - $549.60, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,956.32.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
